behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files (tcp_wrap.ts, no_deno_api_in_polyfills.ts) and the TCP class, listen() method, and EXPECTED_VIOLATIONS key that tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is dead (legacy server accept path) and that listen()/connect should remain, without stating specific line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check structural invariants (class export, listen method, EXPECTED_VIOLATIONS presence) and lint passing, which any correct dead-code removal would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute deno lint and tools/lint.js subprocess commands, not just grepping.

test_not_tautological.reason: deno lint with the custom plugin and tools/lint.js --js require the lint violations to be consistent with EXPECTED_VIOLATIONS, so a no-op stub would fail.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Removal of dead code and lint plugin update are both covered by tests (lint checks and EXPECTED_VIOLATIONS inspection).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with section comments (Gates pass_to_pass, static vs repo_tests) and descriptive function names.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references the files by name which is necessary for the task scope and doesn't call out specific lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
